title: epipactis epipogium
intro: Epipactis epipogium, also known as the helleborine or leafless orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating respiratory issues, as well as having antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Epipactis epipogium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its use as a medicinal plant requires further scientific research and validation.
